scripts.build: npm run build -w @agbms/shared && npm run build -w @agbms/api && npm run build -w @agbms/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @agbms/shared && npm run build:prod -w @agbms/web && node scripts/prepare-vercel-output.mjs
scripts.build:api:deploy: npm run build -w @agbms/shared && npm run build:deploy -w @agbms/api
